summary:
WAVE OF PATRIOTISM: Brandon describes a vision of a new wave of patriotism emerging in the United States. Brandon notes a red wave originating in Michigan and observes people in Oklahoma carrying torches that resemble fire. This movement spreads rapidly across the country, symbolizing a renewed patriotic fervor being birthed nationwide.

ASSASSINATION ATTEMPT AND SPIRITUAL AWAKENING: Brandon recounts witnessing an attempt on Donald Trump's life, where a bullet narrowly misses his head but bursts his eardrum. Following this event, Brandon sees Trump falling to his knees in worship, experiencing a radical spiritual rebirth, and becoming deeply passionate about his faith in Jesus.

LEGAL STRUGGLES AND ELECTION VICTORY: Brandon explains that Trump will face severe legal persecution and lawsuits lasting into the summer. However, Brandon notes that these legal challenges will cease by the fall. Subsequently, a strong turnout of patriotic voters will lead to Brandon seeing Trump winning the presidential election.

ECONOMIC CRISIS AND OVAL OFFICE INTERCESSION: Brandon warns of an impending economic crash more severe than the Great Depression, bringing a period of profound darkness. During this time, Brandon envisions a metaphorical shocking of American soil, accompanied by a scene in the Oval Office where Trump and various officials or ministers are fervently praying and interceding. Following this spiritual intervention, Brandon observes the heavy darkness of the financial crisis lifting, ushering in a return to prosperous and positive times.

NATIONAL SHAKING AND CORRECTION: Brandon shares a message regarding a designated season of shaking intended to awaken the nation. Brandon clarifies that this period should not be viewed as divine judgment or impending doom, but rather as a necessary correction. Ultimately, Brandon foresees a great spiritual revival, indicating a continued positive trajectory for America.
rawData: [November 08, 2024]-[Re-visiting the Trump ear prophecy]-[https://youtu.be/E9yIcB42BS8]-[Amen. He said there's going to be a new wave of patriotism coming out, and that's whenever I saw Trump and I saw a red wave coming out of Michigan. Then I saw Oklahoma, and there were embers of people; they had torches all throughout Oklahoma and they were raising up these torches that looked like fire. They were bringing forth a new patriotism upon the nation, and it was being birthed and just kept spreading like fire all throughout America. I saw Trump rising up, and then I saw an attempt on his life. This bullet flew by his ear, and it came so close to his head that it busted his eardrum. He fell to his knees during this timeframe and he started worshipping the Lord. He got radically born again during this timeframe. I'm talking—people say he's saved now, but he becomes really on fire for Jesus from what I saw coming. Then I saw people interceding. I saw him winning the presidency. The Lord showed me it would go clear into the summer; great persecution would come on him through the judges, the law, and all these people trying to sue him, but there would be a stop to it. Things would start to break free coming toward the fall, and then I saw him winning the election through the patriots coming out and voting. Then there will be a great economic crash. I saw they had a great economic plan, a crash worse than the Great Depression. The Lord warned me about this; it would be a great dark time. But I saw paddles coming upon America's soil like a shocking of the soil. I saw Donald Trump praying in the Oval Office, and he was weeping before the Lord with his hands on his head. He was weeping, and there were ministers and people—I don't know if they were senators or congresspeople—I just saw them pacing back and forth inside the Oval Office, and they were interceding all inside there. I could feel the presence of the Lord so strong on this. Then I could see that darkness that was the heaviness upon America with the financial crisis of what I saw coming; it started to lift above the trees. I saw the blue and the things coming back out, and the green times and good times coming back again. But the Lord said it would be a season of a shaking, and it would be a shaking to awaken. Basically, He was not done with America; there would be a great revival. It's not all doom and gloom—that's what He said. The sky is not falling. It's just a time—it's like people would say this is judgment, and the Lord said, "Do not call this judgment. It's not my judgment; it's a correction." There's a correction coming.]
